events.title: ABUELA LUNA — Full Moon Cacao Ceremony with Raio
events.description: Raio — medicine man Rob Weber, eighteen years rooted in Bali — opens the August full moon at the Yoga Barn. His ABUELA LUNA format runs on the moon itself, not the nearest Friday: August 9 is the night. The ceremony moves through cacao, live medicine music, and sacred fire, with Carlos Romero on kamel'ngoni and Spanish guitar, Ryan Narayan, Rob Recker, and Sky weaving tribal percussion, analog drum machines, synths, and soulful vocals into a single arc. Prayer-planting closes the circle before 21:15.
events.short_description: Raio's monthly full moon cacao ceremony at Yoga Barn — medicine music ensemble, sacred fire, and prayer planting on the August moon.

events.title: Full-Day Shamanic Breathwork Immersion
events.description: A full-day conscious connected breathwork immersion at the Yoga Barn — multiple breath rounds paired with somatic body and energy work and a chakra-attuned music journey into non-ordinary states. The format follows the Venus Rising / Shamanic Breathwork lineage: extended activation, movement integration, sound layering, and group sharing. A rare full-day container for those ready to go deep without ceremony substances. Facilitator name to be confirmed on Megatix before attending.
events.short_description: Full-day conscious connected breathwork at Yoga Barn — somatic body work, chakra-attuned sound, and group integration.

events.title: Shamanic Breathwork
events.description: A single-session shamanic breathwork journey at the Yoga Barn — conscious connected breathing paired with body and energy work and a chakra-attuned music journey. This standalone session sits in the same lineage as the Jul 26 full-day immersion and the Aug 30 longer format: the same inner-journey structure, compressed into a single evening or morning container. Facilitator name to be confirmed on Megatix before attending.
events.short_description: Single-session shamanic breathwork at Yoga Barn — conscious connected breathing with somatic work and chakra-attuned sound.
